title: descurainia tanacetifolia subsp. suffruticosa
intro: Descurainia tanacetifolia subsp. suffruticosa, also known as Western tansy mustard, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of compounds such as isothiocyanates and saponins. The health benefits of Western tansy mustard include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Western tansy mustard can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
